build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(80, 120, 6)
STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(5).cutThruAll()
STEP 3: Add raised feature for mounting holes — .faces("<Z").workplane(offset=6).rect(4, 4).extrude(0.5)
STEP 4: Create bolt holes — .faces("<Z").workplane(offset=6).circle(2.5).cutThruAll()
STEP 5: Add kingpin pocket — .faces(">X").workplane().polyline([(0, -10), (0, 10), (30, 10), (30, -10)]).close().extrude(6)
STEP 6: Cut out bolt holes in kingpin pocket — .edges("|Z").fillet(2)
